meaning: n.骑脚踏车者,骑自行车的人
examples: For Pruitt, a keen bicyclist, the first thing to do was replace his stolen bike.
This bicyclist seems a little fishy!
The bicyclist was cut out by the van.
Another bicyclist stopped, clearly winded from her climb up the other side of the hill.
"It's like an obstacle course, " Frankie Acosta, a 33-year-old bicyclist, said shortly after a pedestrian swiped his shoulder.
